epigraph.quote: Simon, Thomas + Peter frolicked in the river when we reached the valley bottom, while Eve lay collapsed on the turf.

per_stop.quote: We got supper ready & had just started when it rained, carried it into the tent, carried it out for pudding, when it started to rain again!
We set off for Harlech + spent the morning there going up + down the tower
We had lunch at Trawsfynydd, a damned lake.
